notes: v0.3.9: Fix data URL parsing bug that broke every video clip save since v0.3.7. My blobToBase64 function split the FileReader data URL on the first comma to find the base64 payload, but the Blob's MIME type is 'video/webm;codecs=vp8,opus' — the comma inside codecs=vp8,opus got interpreted as the separator, so the 'base64' sent to Rust actually started with 'opus;base64,...' and the decoder choked on ';' (ASCII 59) at offset 4. Fix: find the specific ';base64,' marker instead of the first comma. Per RFC 2397 data URLs can have commas inside mediatype parameters — indexOf(',') was never correct.
